tracks.meaning: the power or right to enforce laws, make decisions, or command obedience within a jurisdiction or domain
a person or organization officially empowered to make and enforce rules or decisions
an expert or official body with specialized knowledge or decision-making power in a particular field
credibility, influence, or persuasive power derived from expertise, position, or reputation
the confidence and respect shown toward a person or institution based on their demonstrated competence or legitimacy
a knowledgeable or commanding person regarded as an expert or reliable source on a subject
the right or power to command troops, enforce discipline, or make strategic decisions
